title: barleria noctiflora
intro: Barleria noctiflora, also known as night-flowering barleria or night-blooming firecracker, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Barleria noctiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
